competencies.title: Autonomous Agent Architecture
competencies.descriptor: Multi-model agent systems with controlled tool-use, reasoning, and action-planning pipelines

competencies.title: NIST SP 800-53 / RMF (Steps 1-6)
competencies.descriptor: Full lifecycle risk management framework implementation from categorization through continuous monitoring

competencies.title: Identity & Access Governance
competencies.descriptor: Entra ID governance with PIM, RBAC, conditional access, and access reviews enforcing least-privilege

competencies.title: Risk Assessment & Compliance Automation
competencies.descriptor: Automating compliance workflows to reduce manual effort by 70%+ while improving auditability

competencies.title: Cloud Security Posture Management
competencies.descriptor: Defender for Cloud, Secure Score optimization, NSGs, and Linux hardening in Azure environments

competencies.title: Security Automation Engineering
competencies.descriptor: Building production-ready security platforms that eliminate the human-dependent security gap

competencies.title: SOC 2 Readiness & ITGC
competencies.descriptor: Audit-ready documentation, control gap analysis, and remediation plans aligned with trust criteria

competencies.title: OSINT & Threat Intelligence
competencies.descriptor: Monitoring, correlating, and producing actionable intelligence to support early threat detection

additionalSkills: Policy Development, ServiceNow, Power BI, Tableau, Vulnerability Scanning, Encryption Standards

projects.name: UgoAI
projects.summary: Fully local autonomous AI agent that thinks, plans, and controls systems. No API keys, no cloud dependency. Security-first architecture with agentic workflow orchestration and real DevOps automation. The project that ties it all together.

projects.name: AtlasPay Risk Assessment
projects.summary: End-to-end NIST 800-53 risk assessment for a FinTech payment processor. Quantitative scoring, risk register, heat map, and executive treatment recommendations for SOC 2 readiness.

projects.name: Scenario-Based Cyber Risk Analyses
projects.summary: Scenario-driven analysis of privileged account abuse and third-party vendor breaches. NIST-aligned threat pathways with quantitative risk scoring for executive decision-making.

projects.name: AtlasPay Risk Profile & BCP
projects.summary: Business Continuity Plan and organizational risk profile for simulated AtlasPay environment. Critical process analysis, recovery priorities, and resilience strategies.

projects.name: Cyber Security Policy Library
projects.summary: NIST-aligned cybersecurity policy templates covering access control, incident response, third-party risk, and security awareness. Designed for governance and practical adoption.

projects.name: Identity Governance (PIM/RBAC)
projects.summary: Identity and access governance implementation with Azure PIM, RBAC, and access reviews. Privileged identity management for enterprise security.
